CircuitComplete: The circuit is complete! The bulb lights up!
TryAgain: Not all bulbs are lit. Keep trying!
SwitchHint: Click the switch to toggle it
DragHint: Drag from one terminal to another to create a wire
Level1Desc: Connect the battery to the light bulb
Level2Desc: Light up two bulbs in series
Level3Desc: Use the switch to control the bulb
Level4Desc: Light up two bulbs with limited wires
Level5Desc: Build a parallel circuit for two bulbs
AllLevelsDone: You completed all levels! You're an electricity expert!
TutorialGoal: Connect the battery to the bulbs so they light up
TutorialDrag: Drag between terminals (dark circles) to create wires
TutorialCheck: Press the check button to test your circuit
TutorialReset: Press reset to start the level over
